hook: The right second date often makes the first one easier to understand.
body: Patterns emerge more clearly once novelty drops and both people have to contribute more of their actual selves.

hook: Many men overread the first date because they are hungry for a quick answer.
body: Use the second date to test whether the good parts of the first were real or merely situational.

hook: Use the second date to test whether the good parts of the first were real or merely situational.
body: If the warmth vanishes completely on date two, that tells you something. If it grows, that tells you something too.

body: Let date two clarify the trend instead of trying to squeeze certainty out of date one alone.
